data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simple and direct navigation to minimize user decision time.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Interactive elements are sized and positioned for easy user accessibility.
data.technical_spec: Large, easily clickable buttons tailored for both mouse and touch interaction.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Visually appealing design fosters user satisfaction and perceived usability.
data.technical_spec: High-quality imagery and consistent color schemes.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Consistency in design to align with user expectations based on common internet standards.
data.technical_spec: Standardized UI paradigms and common design patterns.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Related content grouped together to improve comprehension.
data.technical_spec: Use of white space and grouping techniques.
